name: zvideo_module_init
description: zVideo::ModuleInit seeds zVideo global defaults, initializes pixel-pack descriptors, binds the software fullscreen renderer dispatch, performs DirectDraw default selection, registers teardown with atexit, and returns success.
known_limits: VC5SP3 11.00.7022 /O2 /Ob0 /Zp4 COFF byte compare fails with 88 unmasked mismatches after masking 68 relocation bytes; Binary Ninja body is 162 bytes and the VC object body is 160 bytes with 7 trailing VC NOPs trimmed.
The reviewed failure is bulk global-zeroing shape, store ordering, and call setup drift across already accepted pixel-pack, dispatch-binding, DirectDraw enumeration, and CRT atexit dependencies.

The native smoke verifies success return, key zeroed defaults, palette/fullscreen/dither defaults, texture pixel-pack seed state, default hardware API selection, and cleared selected D3D device pointer.
